ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To May-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Kristina Lam, Esq., for Diane Benton, Administrator.

At the outset, the court reminds counsel of the delays in addressing the issues with this matter, all which have been discussed at the three (3) previous status hearings, regarding filing an additional bond, after the court issued an ex parte order increasing the bond two (2) months ago, and the filing of a Final Inventory and Appraisal. Counsel reports that an original bond and Inventory and Appraisal should be filed soon and expect that a Petition for Final Distribution will follow. The court advises counsel that it intends to take the instant petition off calendar and will set a future date for a hearing on status on close of estate. No objection to the court's tentative ruling is presented. A new hearing date is discussed and agreed to accordingly.

The Report of Status of Administration is taken off calendar. A hearing on Status on Close of Estate is set for Apr-14-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court admonishes counsel that it shall consider suspending the administrator under Probate Code 12205 if no progress is made by the next calling. Counsel acknowledges the court's warning.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared via zoom for M. Diane Julie Benton (administrator).

Mr. Feder stated that they filed the petition on Friday. Matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Continued To Oct-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Sep-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mrs. Lam requested a 45-day continuance stating that they were working on the ex parte petition to increase the bond, but they didn't have an accurate number to increase the bond to, that they are working with their client to get the latest statements and that they are working with the accountant. Status on close of estate is continued to September 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Jul-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for Diane Benton.

The court noted that this estate has been dormant, and that the administrator is under bonded. Mrs. Lam stated that they recently received the bank statements, that they are in the process of reviewing them, that one of the beneficiaries will not waive an accounting, and requested a 60-day continuance. Mrs. lam also stated that she will look into the bond issue and request an increase immediately. Status on close of estate is continued to July 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Continued To May-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kristina Lam, Esq., via Zoom, for M. Diane Benton, Personal Representative.

At the outset, the court states its concerns that no Inventory and Appraisal has been filed since the transfer of assets from the Conservator, over a year ago. Counsel offers an update regarding the status of the Estate and that the Inventory and Appraisal should be filed soon and requests a continuance to allow time to prepare a petition. The court advises that it intends to grant counsel's request for a continuance and reminds counsel that the court will expect either a petition for final distribution or, a petition for approval of status of administration prior to the next calling.

The subject matter is continued to May-06-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.
